messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text "hello world" colors, through a frontend ui
Clarifications:
- framework: Express
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS — create hello world app, where i can modify the text \"hello world\" colors, through a frontend ui",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "setup-project",
      "title": "Initialize project scaffold",
      "description": "Create project folder, initialize npm (package.json), add .gitignore and basic folder structure (src, public).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A project directory exists with package.json, .gitignore, and src and public folders created."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-dependencies",
      "title": "Install required dependencies",
      "description": "Install Express and development tools plus Tailwind CSS, PostCSS and Autoprefixer; add dev tools like nodemon and tailwind CLI as needed.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "npm install completed and package.json lists express, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer and dev tooling entries."
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-tailwind",
      "title": "Configure Tailwind CSS build",
      "description": "Create tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js, create input CSS file with Tailwind directives, and add npm scripts to build/watch Tailwind output to public directory.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-dependencies"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js present and npm script builds a CSS file in public (e.g., public/styles.css) that contains Tailwind utilities."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-express-server",
      "title": "Create Express server to serve frontend",
      "description": "Implement server (e.g., server.js) that serves static files from public, serves index.html at root, and listens on a configurable port.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-dependencies"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Node process starts without errors and visiting http://localhost:<port> returns the index.html file from public."
    },
    {
      "id": "build-frontend-ui",
      "title": "Develop frontend UI for editing text and colors",
      "description": "Create index.html and client-side JS that displays the \"hello world\" text and UI controls (color picker or inputs) to modify text color and background color live using Tailwind/inline styles.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind",
        "create-express-server"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Index page shows \"hello world\" and controls; changing controls updates the displayed text color and background instantly in the browser."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-api",
      "title": "Add optional API to persist color settings",
      "description": "Add Express POST/GET endpoints (e.g., /api/settings) that accept and return current color settings; store them in memory or simple JSON file for demo persistence.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-express-server"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "API endpoints respond with 200 and correct JSON; frontend can save and load settings via these endpoints."
    },
    {
      "id": "integrate-and-test",
      "title": "Integration, build and manual testing",
      "description": "Run Tailwind build and start server, verify static serving, frontend UI functions, API persistence works, and fix any layout or build issues.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "build-frontend-ui",
        "implement-api"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "End-to-end verification: server serves assets, UI updates colors live, and saved settings persist and reload; no runtime errors in console."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down incremental setup separating environment setup, dependency installation, styling configuration, backend server creation, frontend UI development, optional API persistence, and final integration/testing. Each step depends on the previous environment/configuration tasks to ensure a reproducible build-and-run flow."
}
